message:
feat(builder): Add simple bracket wrapper methods

Add callback-style helpers for safe bracket emission:
- withParen(body_fn, ctx) - wraps content in parentheses
- withBraces(body_fn, ctx) - wraps content in braces
- withAnonLiteral(body_fn, ctx) - wraps content in .{...}
- withBinaryOp(op, left_fn, right_fn, ctx) - emits (left op right)
- withCall(func_name, args_fn, ctx) - emits func(args)

These guarantee bracket matching via callback patterns,
complementing existing withBlock, withStruct, etc.
